title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 256.330 - Commission to report to legislature, contents
text:
256.330.  Commission to report to legislature, contents. — In order to serve the legislature with full information, the clean water commission shall report those segments of long-range planning which are applicable to management of the fund to each legislative session.  The reports shall include economic justification for any recommendations involving contribution to or withdrawal from the fund, and shall also demonstrate benefits accruing to the state as a whole.
(L. 1965 p. 389 § 4)
